projectDescription: A turnkey, automation-first platform for standing up fully governed Kafka, Flink, and Schema Registry infrastructure across eight deployment models — enabling financial institutions to achieve production-ready, DR-capable streaming in hours.
keyFeatures: Eight deployment scenarios (Confluent Cloud AWS/Azure/GCP, CFK on OpenShift, CP on RHEL, Private Cloud, LinuxONE variants) with governance parity
Single Terraform topic module generates topic + Avro schema + RBAC bindings + DR mirror + metadata tags
SLA-tier system (critical/standard/best-effort/compliance) auto-derives partition count, retention, and schema compatibility
Three DR backends (Cluster Linking, MirrorMaker 2, Multi-Region Cluster) with unified CLI and Ansible playbooks
Pre-built observability dashboards for six providers: Dynatrace, Datadog, Splunk, Grafana, New Relic, IBM Instana
FSI compliance features: FIPS 140-2 validation, CSFLE field-level encryption, up to 7-year retention for OFAC/AML, audit trail CI pipeline
Consul-based atomic failover for Kafka, Schema Registry, and database endpoints with single KV flip
Reference client implementations in Java 17, Python, and .NET with DLQ patterns and Avro/SR integration
C4E pre-check CI pipeline validates topic naming, schema compatibility, RBAC, and SLA tiers across all three config formats
LinuxONE (s390x) support with FIPS 140-2, mTLS, CEX/HSM hardware security module integration
publicApiSurface: modules/topic — Terraform module: domain, application, schema_version, entity, owner, sla_tier, schema_file, pii_fields, producer_service_accounts, consumer_service_accounts
modules/flink — Terraform module for CC Flink compute pool and SQL statement management
scripts/fsi-dr.sh — DR CLI: failover, failback, status with --backend cl|mm2|mrc and --dry-run|--force flags
scripts/validate-apply.sh — Post-apply Terraform validation with compliance audit trail
ansible/site.yml — End-to-end Ansible orchestration pipeline with tags: topics, schemas, rbac, connect, observability, dr
ansible/roles/cp_topic — Topic CRUD via Admin REST v3 with SLA-tier governance
ansible/roles/cp_schema — Avro schema registration with two-pass compatibility safety
ansible/roles/cp_rbac — MDS RBAC binding lifecycle with LIST/DIFF/ADD/REMOVE reconciliation
ansible/roles/cp_dr_mm2 — MM2 failover/failback with Consul flip and state validation
ansible/roles/cp_dr_mrc — MRC observer promotion for RPO=0 scenarios
FSI_DR_BACKEND env var — Selects DR backend: cluster-linking (default), mm2, mrc
SLA tier values: critical | standard | best-effort | compliance
